name: io.github.mshegolev/prometheus-mcp
description: Prometheus MCP — query metrics, inspect alerts, and explore scrape targets (read-only).

environmentVariables.name: PROMETHEUS_URL
environmentVariables.description: Prometheus server URL, e.g. https://prometheus.example.com (no trailing slash)

environmentVariables.name: PROMETHEUS_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Bearer token for authentication. Takes priority over Basic auth.

environmentVariables.name: PROMETHEUS_USERNAME
environmentVariables.description: HTTP Basic auth username. Used only when PROMETHEUS_TOKEN is not set.

environmentVariables.name: PROMETHEUS_SSL_VERIFY
environmentVariables.description: Verify SSL certificates (true/false). Set to 'false' for self-signed certs.

environmentVariables.name: PROMETHEUS_TIMEOUT
environmentVariables.description: HTTP request timeout in seconds. Increase for slow or remote Prometheus instances.

environmentVariables.name: PROMETHEUS_MAX_RESPONSE_BYTES
environmentVariables.description: Maximum HTTP response body size in bytes. Protects against runaway queries. Default: 10485760 (10MB).

environmentVariables.name: PROMETHEUS_CACHE_TTL
environmentVariables.description: Cache TTL in seconds for metric name lists. Set to 0 to disable. Default: 300.
